label: Java string concatenation into SELECT
text: String query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + userId;

label: Python + concatenation into WHERE clause
text: query = "SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user = " + username

label: safe parameterized query with ?
text: String query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?";

label: comment about avoiding SQL concat
text: // Always use prepared statements instead of concatenation

label: JS string method call is not concatenation
property access on a SQL-ish string is not concatenation
prose word containing a SQL verb is not SQL
log message starting with a SQL verb is not SQL
DELETE FROM concatenation
text: q = "DELETE FROM sessions WHERE id = " + id
